message:
Add AI Missions Setup to sidebar nav, cross-links, and auto-refetch leaderboard data (#1334)

- Add AI Missions Setup page to console sidebar navigation in page-map.ts
  (fixes #1321, fixes #1322)
- Add cross-link from AI Features page to AI Missions Setup guide
- Add cross-link from Installation page to AI Missions Setup guide
- Auto-refetch leaderboard data when countdown reaches a scheduled refresh
  window, so scores update without manual page reload (fixes #1333)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
